# Coding Guidelines

<!-- Generated by /caveman-docs:ai-context. Manual edits overwritten on re-run. -->

## AS IS — Current state

### 1. Hooks must never block tool calls

Every hook exits 0 on any error. Silent-fail inside `try/catch`.

Bad:
```js
process.stdin.on('end', () => {
  const data = JSON.parse(input); // throws → non-zero exit → blocks tool
  // ...
});
```

Good:
```js
process.stdin.on('end', () => {
  try {
    const data = JSON.parse(input);
    // ...
  } catch (e) {
    // Silent fail — never block a tool call
  }
  process.exit(0);
});
```

Enforcement: `hooks/caveman-docs-pre-write.js:92`, `hooks/caveman-docs-tracker.js:112`.

### 2. AI doc writes obey SKILL.md compression rules

No meta-prose, no hedging, tables > lists, bullets > paragraphs, code blocks verbatim, numbers as digits, active voice.

Bad:
```
## Build

This section provides an overview of the build commands available in this project.
You can typically run the tests using `npm test`.
```

Good:
```
## Build

| Command | Purpose |
|---------|---------|
| `npm test` | all tests |
```

Enforcement: 3 hooks (`caveman-docs-activate.js` SessionStart injection, `caveman-docs-tracker.js` prompt detection, `caveman-docs-pre-write.js` path match) per `skills/caveman-docs/SKILL.md`.

### 3. settings.json mutation is atomic with backup

Never edit `~/.claude/settings.json` outside the installer's Node block. Back up to `.caveman-docs.bak` before mutation.

Bad: `echo '{...}' > ~/.claude/settings.json`

Good:
```sh
cp "$SETTINGS" "$SETTINGS.caveman-docs.bak"
node -e "const s=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(path,'utf8')); /* mutate */; fs.writeFileSync(path, JSON.stringify(s,null,2)+'\n');"
```

Enforcement: `hooks/install.sh:115-181`.

### 4. Hook path matching uses normalized forward slashes

Normalize `\` → `/` before regex test so Windows paths match the same patterns.

Good: `const normalized = filePath.replace(/\\/g, '/');`

Enforcement: `hooks/caveman-docs-pre-write.js:35`.

### 5. Human docs exempt — never compress

Always check exempt list before acting. Exempt: `README.md`, `CHANGELOG.md`, `CONTRIBUTING.md`, Confluence, Jira, PR descriptions, commit messages.

Enforcement: `HUMAN_DOC_PATTERNS` in `hooks/caveman-docs-pre-write.js:27` and `hooks/caveman-docs-tracker.js:43`.
